outcome: Cell spec restricted content reads to fsutil JSON wrappers while mandating markdown frontmatter as a source; worker had to add fsutil.readText out of declared scope. Plans that name a non-JSON source must also name its reader.

A worker died mid-cell after editing SKILL.md but before writing its RED pressure-test report; the orchestrator reverted the edit rather than reconstruct RED from the worker's summary. Iron Law cells must checkpoint RED to disk per scenario, not hold it in context until the end.

Orchestrator released a live worker's reservations and reset its cell after an unreliable stalled/killed notification, causing a duplicate dispatch on evolving-4. No corruption (the first worker finished; the second NOOPed) but the reservation guard was defeated by the orchestrator itself. Rule: never release another agent's reservations or reset a claimed cell on a stall signal alone — verify the worker is dead by checking for disk progress over an interval first.

Lane scaling v2 settled: docs lane + tiny/small fast path (merged gate, solo execution, scaled review) across bee-hive/planning/validating/swarming/reviewing SKILL.md + go-mode.md — spec areas covering the workflow need this merged
